steps.title: Find what both essays share
steps.content: The passage says the Federalist Papers were published in 1787-88, and both named essays belong to that collection. That shared publication window is confirmed for both essays.

steps.title: Reject unsupported similarities
steps.content: Choice A is false because No. 6 is certainly by Hamilton. Choice C invents collaboration. Choice D overstates the newspaper detail; publication was divided among the Daily Advertiser and other papers. The confirmed common point is timing. The answer is B.
